    • RVFL model for univariate time series
    • Zero-inflated GLM model (plus other models)

    RVFL model for univariate time series

    tsrvfl.Rmd
    library(rvfl)
require(glmnet)
    ## Loading required package: glmnet
    ## Loading required package: Matrix
    ## Loaded glmnet 4.1-10
    require(survival)
    ## Loading required package: survival
    plot(ahead::dynrmf(fit_func=rvfl::rvfl, y=fdeaths, engine=glmnet::cv.glmnet, h=20L))
    ## Registered S3 method overwritten by 'quantmod':
##   method            from
##   as.zoo.data.frame zoo

    plot(ahead::dynrmf(fit_func=rvfl::rvfl, y=mdeaths, engine=glmnet::cv.glmnet, h=20L))

    plot(ahead::dynrmf(fit_func=rvfl::rvfl, y=ldeaths, engine=glmnet::cv.glmnet, h=20L))

    plot(ahead::dynrmf(fit_func=rvfl::rvfl, y=Nile, engine=glmnet::cv.glmnet, h=20L))

    Developed by T. Moudiki.
